Current focus

What I Am Prioritizing

  • Hubtel relationship work: stronger merchant support quality, faster issue closure, and consistent partner follow-up.
  • Iderwell delivery: building practical systems that help business owners run cleaner operations.
  • Public documentation: keeping this website and my journal updated as an accurate source of truth.
